features.description: per_disk_backup_dir() and resolve_shadow_part_path() helpers with part-existence fallback chain (per-disk encoded -> legacy encoded -> legacy plain -> None)

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub fn per_disk_backup_dir\|pub fn resolve_shadow_part_path' src/backup/collect.rs | tr -d ' '
layers.fail_message: per_disk_backup_dir or resolve_shadow_part_path not found in collect.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding helpers

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Helper unit tests failed (must cover per-disk, legacy encoded, legacy plain, no-disk-in-manifest, plain-skipped-when-same cases)

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure functions -- resolve_shadow_part_path exercises full 4-step fallback chain via unit tests

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules (src/backup, src/upload, src/download, src/restore) with per-disk patterns, resolve_shadow_part_path, source_db/source_table

layers.name: structural
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/upload src/download src/restore; do [ -f "$m/CLAUDE.md" ] || echo "MISSING: $m/CLAUDE.md"; done; echo DONE
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/upload src/download src/restore; do grep -q 'per.disk\|per_disk\|resolve_shadow' "$m/CLAUDE.md" || echo "FAIL: $m missing per-disk pattern"; done; echo VALID
layers.fail_message: CLAUDE.md missing per-disk backup directory pattern documentation

alternative_verification.command: grep -q 'resolve_shadow_part_path' CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'source_db' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && echo CHECKED || echo FAIL
